CustomField.description: Read-only formula flag that is TRUE when this Lead has been converted into a Contact by either path used in this org: (1) the custom "Lead to Contact Conversion" screen flow, which populates the Contact__c lookup, or (2) the native Salesforce Convert action, which sets the standard IsConverted field. IMPORTANT: the standard IsConverted / ConvertedContactId / ConvertedDate fields are read-only system fields and are NOT persisted by the custom flow (its assignments to them are silently ignored), so IsConverted alone misses every flow-converted Lead. Use THIS field for reports, list-view filters, and validation rules. Formula: OR(NOT(ISBLANK(Contact__c)), IsConverted).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Checked when this Lead has already been converted into a Contact — either through the "Convert to Contact" action (the resulting Contact is shown in the Contact field) or the standard Convert button. Use it to tell at a glance whether a Lead still needs to be worked and to avoid converting the same Lead twice.
CustomField.label: Converted to Contact
